Short CV

Ayşe Özçetin was born in 1990 in Istanbul. She graduated from Molecular Biology and Genetics in 2012 and completed her master's degree in Neuroscience at Üsküdar University in 2015. She received her Ph.D. from Medipol University Department of Neuroscience in 2020. She continues her studies at Üsküdar University Neuropsychopharmacology Application and Research Center.
